title: Destined Worlds
description: Minecraft but with a Fantasy and Quality of Life twist
body:
# Welcome to Destined Worlds 
a new Modpack created by **[K Studios Development](https://discord.gg/hSkC23cvYQ)**. **Destined Worlds** is a fabric 1.20.1 Modpack built for entertainment and fun at heart, and made to not become boring.

Based off of the original **Destined Worlds** event idea by **[K Studios Development](https://discord.gg/hSkC23cvYQ)** meaning it hosts origins (Over 100 options), terrain by Terralith and Terratonic, tons of new structures for you to explore (200+), create mod for you tech geeks, client side mods for extra enjoyment and qol, and many more mods for you to enjoy!
